channel.title: Products on 深圳百陈服装有限公司 | Bettzen
channel.description: Recent content in Products on 深圳百陈服装有限公司 | Bettzen

item.title: Wholesale Hemp-Cotton T-Shirt | Hand-Drawn Duck Graphic Print
item.description: Focus on ultimate comfort. Made from a breathable hemp-cotton knit blend, known for its soft, cool, drapey feel and moisture-wicking performance.

item.title: Wholesale Linen-Cotton Trousers | Vertical Stripe Wide Leg Pants
item.description: Embrace relaxed tailoring. These trousers feature a woven linen-cotton blend fabric in a vertical stripe pattern, offering excellent breathability, soft dense handfeel and good drape.

item.title: Wholesale Oxford Cotton Crop Shirt | 3D Heart Embroidery
item.description: A youthful and stylish essential for warm-weather collections. Crafted from crisp, 100% Oxford cotton for excellent structure and wrinkle resistance.

item.title: Wholesale Premium Cotton Tee | Ultra-Soft Minimalist Label Print
item.description: The foundation of any great wardrobe. Made from an exceptionally fine and soft cotton jersey, this tee offers a luxurious, lightweight handfeel and long-lasting wear resistance.

item.title: Wholesale Designer Skirt | 3D Embossed Cupro with Metallic Sheen
item.description: A statement cupro skirt with metallic sheen and 3D embossed floral details. Asymmetric hem, sophisticated burgundy.

item.title: Wholesale Women‘s Cargo Pants | Dual-Zipper & Drawstring Slim Fit
item.description: Slim-fit cargo pants with dual zippers and adjustable drawstring. Structured, breathable fabric for streetwear.

item.title: Wholesale Women‘s Linen Viscose Set | Waistcoat & Wide Leg Pants
item.description: A versatile linen-viscose set for office to casual. Garment-washed, wrinkle-resistant, fully lined.

item.title: Wholesale Women‘s Utility Jacket | Corduroy Collar Cotton Twill
item.description: Timeless utility jacket with corduroy stand-collar and multi-pockets. Cotton twill, versatile unisex style.
